instruction: Change the background of the slides 3 to 5 to Light Lime and change the main title of the 6th slide to "Overall Risks".
provide_info:
Slide 1:
Global Economic Prospects
June 2024
www.worldbank.org/gep

Slide 2:
Global Economic Prospects  –  June 2024
2

Slide 3:
Global Economic Prospects  –  June 2024
3
Underlying data and charts can be found at
www.worldbank.org/gep

Slide 4:
Global Growth Forecasts
Broadly Stable Near-Term Growth; Weaker Than the 2010s Average
4

Slide 5:
Growth and Income Catch-Up
Shifting Growth Distribution; Broad-Based Weakness; Few EMDEs Catching Up
5

Slide 6:
Risks to the Global Outlook
Downside Risks Dominate But Presence of Some Upside Risks
6

Slide 7:
Global Inflation, Interest Rates, and Growth Scenarios
Slower Disinflation; Elevated Interest Rates; Negative Impact of “Higher for Longer” on Growth
7

Slide 8:
Investment Needs, Impact of Public Investment on Growth
Slower Public Investment Growth Despite Large Needs and Positive Impacts
8

Slide 9:
Public Investment: Role of Fiscal Space and Investment Efficiency
Greater Growth Impact with Wider Fiscal Space and Higher Public Investment Efficiency
9

Slide 10:
Fiscal Positions in Small States
More in Debt Distress amid Weaker Primary Balances; Larger Costs of Natural Disasters
10

Slide 11:
Revenue and Expenditure Challenges in Small States
Greater Reliance on Non-Tax Revenues; Spending Inefficiency; Gaps in Fiscal Frameworks
11

Slide 12:
Trade Policy
Weakest Half-Decade Growth; MoreTrade Distortions; Higher Trade Policy Uncertainty
12

Slide 13:
Studies by the World Bank Prospects Group
